steps.title: Keep the order of the fraction
steps.content: The numerator stays $18$ and the input $19$ goes in the denominator. The value is $\frac{18}{19}$, not its reciprocal.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $\frac{18}{19}$ is choice A, the correct answer. Reversing the fraction, using the numerator only, or using the input value only would not give the requested ratio.
